NavSearch.title: Search
NavSearch.emptyState: Quickly find boards and notes by title or content

BoardsPage.title: Your Boards
BoardsPage.description: You have curated {count} collection{count, plural, one {} other {s}} so far. Manage and organize your ideas here.
BoardsPage.emptyDescription: Create your first board to start organizing your notes and thoughts.

BoardDelete.title: Delete Board
BoardDelete.description: Are you sure you want to delete {title}? This action is permanent and cannot be undone. All notes and associated data will be erased.
BoardDelete.warning: Warning: Deleting this board will permanently remove all its content.

NotesPage.description: Manage your collection of {count} note{count, plural, one {} other {s}}. Last updated {date}.
NotesPage.emptyDescription: Start capturing your thoughts and organizing your ideas here.

NoteDelete.title: Delete Note
NoteDelete.description: Are you sure you want to delete {title}? This action is permanent and cannot be undone.
NoteDelete.warning: Warning: Deleting this note will permanently remove its content.

UsersTable.deleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete {name}? This action cannot be undone and will permanently remove all data associated with this account.

Preferences.securityDescription: Manage access controls and authentication methods.
Preferences.mfaDescription: Require an extra code from an authenticator app to sign in.
Preferences.allowRegistrationDescription: Allow new users to create an account on this instance.
Preferences.integrationsDescription: Connect external services and data sources.
Preferences.unsplashDescription: Use Unsplash as a high-quality source for board covers and images.
Preferences.storageDescription: Configure where your media and attachments are stored.
Preferences.s3Description: Offload file storage to an AWS S3 bucket instead of local storage.
Preferences.s3Info: Requires S3 bucket credentials in environment variables.

UserModal.title: New user
UserModal.description: Fill in the details to create a new user.

ProfilePage.title: User data
ProfilePage.description: Manage your profile and backup your data
ProfilePage.adminNoticeDescription: You are impersonating this profile as an admin.
ProfilePage.actionRequiredDescription: 2FA Authentication is not enabled for this profile. It is recommended to enable it for security reasons.

ProfileInfo.title: Profile Information
ProfileInfo.description: Update your account's profile information and email address.
ProfileInfo.namePlaceholder: Enter your nickname, name or fullname
ProfileInfo.emailPlaceholder: Enter your email for password recovery

UpdatePassword.title: Update Password
UpdatePassword.description: Ensure your account is using a long, random password to stay secure.

MFA.title: 2FA Authentication
MFA.disableDescription: To disable multifactor authentication, please type the code from your current authenticator app or request one via email.
MFA.backupFailed: Failed to send code. Please try again later.
MFA.disableWarning: Warning: Disabling 2FA will reduce your account security.
MFA.step1Description: Scan this code with Google Authenticator, Authy, or your preferred TOTP app.

Backup.title: Backup
Backup.description: Save or export all your data in a JSON file. Depending on your data, it may take a while. Please do not refresh this page until the save file dialog appears.

DangerZone.label: Danger Zone
DangerZone.title: Delete Account
DangerZone.description: Once your account is deleted, all of its resources and data will be permanently deleted.
DangerZone.confirmDescription: This action is permanent and cannot be undone. All your notes, settings, and personal data will be erased from our servers.
DangerZone.warning: Warning: You will lose access to all your 2FA settings and recovery codes.

TermsPage.title: Terms of Service
TermsPage.description: Please review the following agreement for using Daylog.

sections.introductionContent: By registering for an account on our platform, you agree to comply with these terms and conditions. Please read them carefully before proceeding with your registration.
sections.accountContent: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials. You agree to notify us immediately of any unauthorized use of your account.
sections.acceptableUseContent: You agree to use our platform for lawful purposes only. Prohibited activities include, but are not limited to: engaging in fraud, violating laws, or uploading harmful content.
sections.licenseContent: This platform is licensed under the Apache 2.0 License. You may use, modify, and share the platform in compliance with the terms of this license.
sections.liabilityContent: To the maximum extent permitted by law, we are not liable for any damages resulting from your use of this platform, including data loss or service interruptions.
sections.terminationContent: We reserve the right to terminate your account at our sole discretion if you violate these terms and conditions.
sections.changesContent: We may update these terms from time to time. Any changes will be communicated to you and will take effect immediately upon posting.

SharedPage.title: Shared Content
SharedPage.description: Manage your shared notes and boards. Total unique readers: {totalReaders}

empty.title: No shared content yet
empty.description: Share a note or board to see it here.

revokeDialog.title: Revoke Share Link
revokeDialog.description: Are you sure you want to revoke the link for {title}? This action will immediately stop all future access.
revokeDialog.warning: Warning: Revoking this link will permanently disable public access to this {target}.

passwordDialog.title: Update Protection
passwordDialog.help: Setting a new password will invalidate the previous one immediately.

errors.revoke: Failed to revoke link. Please try again.
errors.password: Failed to update password. Please try again.

ShareDialog.title: Share {entity}
ShareDialog.subtitle: Configure your secure sharing link
ShareDialog.successDescription: Anyone with this link can view the content based on your settings.

errors.unsplashKey: Unsplash API key is not configured in the environment.
errors.unsplashFetch: Failed to fetch images from Unsplash.
errors.searchUnexpected: An unexpected error occurred while searching.

HomePage.title: Welcome back, {name}
HomePage.description: You have {count} active board{count, plural, one {} other {s}}. Here is your {activity}.

HomeTabs.notesSubtitleRecent: Pick up where you left off
HomeTabs.emptyDescriptionRecent: Your workspace is quiet. Start capturing your thoughts by creating a new note in one of your boards.
HomeTabs.emptyDescriptionFavorite: You haven't marked any notes as favorites yet. Star your important notes to see them here.

LoginPage.title: Welcome back
LoginPage.description: Sign in to access your personal workspace

messages.accountLocked: Account temporarily locked. Please try again later.
messages.tooManyAttempts: Too many login attempts. Please try again later.
messages.signinUnexpected: An error occurred while signing in to your account.
messages.otpInvalid: OTP is not valid or has expired.
messages.otpUnexpected: An error occurred while validating your OTP.

OTPPage.title: Multifactor Authentication
OTPPage.accessDenied: Access denied or MFA not configured.

OTPLoginForm.title: Security Code
OTPLoginForm.description: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app
OTPLoginForm.helperLine1: Use your authenticator app to generate a code

ResetPage.successDescription: Your account has been reset successfully. Please check your email inbox and follow the instructions.
ResetPage.title: Forgot password
ResetPage.description: Enter your email address and we will send you instructions to reset your password.

messages.unexpectedError: An error occurred while resetting your account.
messages.emailBody: Your account password has been reset. Use {password} to log in. Remember to change your password in the profile section.

NoteEditor.picturesHelp: Click to insert an image into the editor at your cursor position.
NoteEditor.changesAppear: Changes will appear here as you edit this note
NoteEditor.warningPermanent: Warning: This action is permanent and will permanently remove this data.
NoteEditor.restoreWarning: Note: You are about to restore the note content. Current unsaved changes might be overwritten.
NoteEditor.clearHistoryDescription: Do you really want to clear all history for this note? This action cannot be undone.
NoteEditor.deleteHistoryEntryDescription: Are you sure you want to delete this specific change from history? This action cannot be undone.
NoteEditor.restoreNoteDescription: Are you sure you want to restore the note to this version? This will replace the current content.
NoteEditor.deleteCommentDescription: Are you sure you want to delete this comment? This action cannot be undone.
